concepts.name: Purusha Witness
concepts.description: The observer pattern — awareness without identification. Purusha witnesses, Prakriti performs.
concepts.key_insight: The witness is not the thought. The witness is not the emotion.

concepts.name: HRV Coherence at 0.1 Hz

concepts.name: The Quine Principle
concepts.description: The system creates the conditions for its own transcendence. Success is measured by independence, not retention.
concepts.mantra: The system succeeds when you no longer need it.

handoff.summary: Tryambakam Noesis is a 13-wing interactive consciousness architecture website built with React 19, Three.js, and TypeScript. It presents 16 symbolic-computational engines through an infinite 3D canvas interface, exploring themes of self-consciousness as technology via the Kha-Ba-La framework (Kha=Spirit, Ba=Body, La=Inertia). The site integrates Vedic astrology (Jyotisha, Nakshatra, Vimshottari Dasha), Western systems (Human Design, Gene Keys, Enneagram), and biofield science (HRV coherence, Tattva cycles, Rāga resonance). Products are physical manifestations of the engines (Attars, Crystals, Kopina, Orgonite, Pendants, Sacred Burnables). Two witness agents — Pichet (Structure, Sanskrit) and Aletheos (Flow, Greek) — embody the dialectic of discipline and emergence.
key_takeaways: 13 interconnected wings navigable via infinite 3D canvas or linear mode
16 engines = 11 Rust core + 5 TypeScript bridges = 256 permutations
Kha-Ba-La is the foundational triad: Spirit (Kha), Body (Ba), Inertia (La)
Purusha Witness is the core practice: observation without identification
HRV coherence at 0.1 Hz is the physiological signature of witness state
Tattva cycles provide 120-minute decision windows (5 elements × 24 phases)
The Quine Principle: system succeeds when user no longer needs it
Somatic Canticles: 27-chapter sci-fi trilogy with biorhythm-synced delivery
Witness Agents: Pichet (Structure, Sanskrit pi-) ↔ Aletheos (Flow, Greek aletheia)
Purushartha: Dharma (purpose), Artha (prosperity), Kama (pleasure), Moksha (liberation) as coordinates not stages
6 product categories are engines in physical form (Attars, Crystals, Kopina, Orgonite, Pendants, Sacred Burnables)
All copy follows 'PubMed x Alex Grey' — clinical precision + visionary artistry
ai_agent_notes: Use slug-based routing for deep linking to specific wings
Reference compass directions (N/E/S/W) and Kosha layers for engine context
The .init protocol represents 90-second micro-rituals for transformation
Voice is The Anatomist Who Sees Fractals: grounded, direct, respectful-challenging
